title: Find My Device - Moving in and out of range
scenario: Find My Device map pin does not update from grey to blue when headset reconnects after moving back into Bluetooth range
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device with a headset already paired and connected.
2. Go to App Settings (gear icon on the Home screen).
3. Tap Find My Device (allow GPS/location permission if prompted).
4. Tap the connected headset from the bottom menu. Expected: Headset window opens showing the map.
5. Move the headset out of Bluetooth range (e.g., walk away with the headset).
6. Move the headset back into Bluetooth range (e.g., return to the phone).
expected: Step 4: Headset window opens showing the map. Step 5: Headset disconnects, \"Out of range\" view is shown, and the map pin turns grey. Step 6: Headset reconnects, \"Nearby\" view is shown, and the map pin turns blue.
